title: Dimy's World
description: Welcome to Dimy's World! The ultimate vanilla+ experience!
body:
![Title image saying: "Dimy's World"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00837ef9439af6a707924b00d64d24b7216bec70.png)
# Welcome to Dimy's World! 👻
> A world shaped, refined and lived in, now ready for you to explore!

Dimy’s World is the place I’ve been building, tweaking, and adventuring in for a long time, and I finally decided it was time to make it public!

It's up to you if you want to build, fight, farm, explore, or simply wander, Dimy’s World is designed to feel like a place worth staying in!
#
![Subtitle image saying: "Trailer"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f75ba062fc38c3d1f403c366cfa6127966f50bb.png)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/k7TpAyAAaQA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

#
![Subtitle image saying: "Features"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddcff5c48316781c00e805337a9d0dd1e21f883f.png)
- **🌹 Overworld generation**                 _(Tectonic, Terralith)_
- **📍 Exciting Exploration**                 _(Yungs structures, End Remastered)_
- **🍎 Farming overhaul**                     _(Farmer's Delight + addons)_
- **🏮 Decorations & blocks**                 _(Handcrafted & [Let's Do] Furniture, Beautify etc.)_
- **🚗 Handy transport**                      _(Automobility, Immersive Aircrafts, faster Minecarts etc.)_
- **👹 Powerful bosses**                      _(Bosses of Mass Destruction, Ender Dragon Fight Remastered etc.)_
- **🍁 Overworld, Nether and End overhaul**   _(Tectonic, Terralith, Amplified Nether, End Remastered etc.)_
- **📕 Minecraft pokédex**                    _(Completionist's Index)_
- _‼️and much more‼️_
# 
![Subtitle image saying: "Planned"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed5bfc61f3d9ba9b0dc1d921ebcb0f3dc0887e9a.png)
<details>
<summary>Guidebook</summary>

A patchouli guidebook helping new players through the modpack. This isn't the hardest or most difficult modpack, but I'd still like to add it to make the modpack feel whole!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Custom Mods</summary>

I'm currently learning how to mod myself, so hopefully I can add my own custom mods into this modpack in upcoming updates!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Dimy's World (with Cobblemon)</summary>

This would be an exact copy of this modpack, but with Cobblemon! It's already in the making, but still needs some tweaks!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Dimy's World (Spooky Edition)</summary>

While I was making this modpack I stumbled on tons of scary mods, which gave me this idea! I haven't started on this one but it sounds fun :)

</details>


If you decide to download the modpack, thank you!👻
